queue_item.action: Convert the Long Animation Frames API into a fail-closed interaction-performance evidence gate.

progress.finding: Long-animation-frame entries provide user-centric main-thread congestion evidence, but unsupported instrumentation must fail closed.
progress.verification: Committed source and tests inspected through GitHub contents API; tests were not executed because no checkout or workflow runner was available in this run.

handoff: Vercel Studio should capture buffered and live long-animation-frame entries around one exact interaction sequence, call evaluateInteractionBudget, and retain the verdict with deployment identity. Unsupported browsers must remain inconclusive rather than passing.
next_action: Run node tools/frontier-research/long-animation-frame-budget.test.mjs in a clean checkout, then wire the classifier into the Vercel interaction evidence packet without treating a passing observation window as universal smoothness.
